eiswein.title: Brew Eiswein (Vinery mod — the highest tier wine, full heal on consume, requires frozen grapes in winter)

wine_rack.title: Build a wine rack in your settlement (Vinery — decorative + functional storage for aged wines)

subtitle.text: The best wine in the world is made in winter. You have to wait for the freeze.

description: Vinery adds 26 wines with different effects and production methods.
Eiswein is the pinnacle — it provides a full heal on consumption.
- Requires frozen grapes (harvest grapes in winter when frozen)
- Aging time applies — longer barrel time may improve quality
This is the intersection of Serene Seasons + Vinery:
The winter from Ch15's seasonal cycle is the same winter that enables Eiswein.
If you are in winter, freeze grapes.
The Eiswein will be ready by the time you need it in Ch17.
The settlement wine rack is both functional (stores wines) and a marker of civilization.
No previous civilization had a wine rack.
→ Build a wine rack in your settlement [check]
